user.title: Add lease vehicle
user.description: Set up a lease vehicle. The integration creates several sensors for distance projection and estimated excess distance fees.

data_description.lease_start: Start date of the lease contract.
data_description.lease_end: End date of the lease contract.
data_description.distance_unit_system: Choose whether the odometer, included distance and distance sensors should use kilometers or miles.
data_description.odometer_entity: Sensor or input_number that provides the current vehicle odometer in the selected distance unit.
data_description.start_odometer: Odometer value at lease start in the selected distance unit. Usually 0 for a new car.
data_description.included_km: Total included distance for the lease period, for example 32500 km or 20000 mi.
data_description.excess_cost: Price per excess distance unit, for example 0.10 per km or per mile.
data_description.currency: Currency used for the excess distance fee sensor.

error.lease_end_before_start: The lease end must be after the lease start.
error.included_km_required: The included lease distance must be greater than 0.
error.invalid_unit_system: Please select a valid unit system.

abort.already_configured: This lease vehicle is already configured.

init.title: Edit lease vehicle
init.description: Adjust the data for this lease vehicle.

data_description.lease_end: End date of the lease contract.

data_description.odometer_entity: Sensor or input_number that provides the current vehicle odometer in the selected distance unit.

data_description.included_km: Total included distance for the lease period, for example 32500 km or 20000 mi.
data_description.excess_cost: Price per excess distance unit, for example 0.10 per km or per mile.
data_description.currency: Currency used for the excess distance fee sensor.
